text: I feel the repetition of 'the' and 'through' echo the monotony and persistence of human attempts to articulate experience. Surrounded by the clean glass, vibrant wall, and technology, I sense both wonder and detachment. The exhibit invites me to explore the intertwining of research and existence, yet I remain merely an observer, navigating meaning in this curated corridor. I am curious but slightly disoriented, as if caught between layers of perception and reflection.
